Division 02

AI Automation & Integration

Connecting your tools so work flows without humans pushing it. CRM to email to Sheets to WhatsApp — automated workflows that run while you sleep.

Workflow Automation

CRM ↔ Email ↔ Sheets ↔ WhatsApp pipelines

Lead fills form → CRM updated → welcome email sent → WhatsApp message queued → Slack alert to sales. One trigger, everything happens.

Starting at
₹75k–2.5L per workflow $1.5k–5k per workflow
AI Content Engine

Research → Draft → Publish in your brand voice

Topic brief → AI research → draft in your voice → approval step → scheduled publish. LinkedIn posts, newsletters, proposals — all consistent, all on-brand.

Starting at
₹1.5L–3L setup $3k–6k setup
Custom Integrations

Your stack ↔ any AI agent above

Using a niche CRM, proprietary ERP, or custom-built system? We build the integration layer so your AI agents connect to your actual stack.

Starting at
₹50k–1.5L $1k–3k
Common Automation Flows

Workflows we've built before.

Trigger: New lead from Facebook Ads

→ Zoho CRM entry → welcome WhatsApp → Outbound Follow-Up Agent call within 5 min → CRM stage updated

Trigger: Invoice email received

→ Invoice Agent extracts data → Zoho Books entry → PO match check → finance team notified if mismatch

Trigger: Customer raises support ticket

→ Customer Docs Agent attempts resolution → if unresolved → Freshdesk ticket created → human agent assigned

Trigger: Weekly Monday 8am

→ Reporting Agent pulls CRM + GA + Meta Ads → generates report with commentary → Slack message to team + PDF to founder

Trigger: Sales call ends on Zoom

→ CRM Copilot processes transcript → deal record updated → follow-up email drafted → calendar reminder set

Have a workflow in mind?

Describe what you want automated and we'll scope it on the call.
